runtimeNote: The Codex desktop bundled Node v24.14.0 lacked its adjacent Corepack distribution. Verification was rerun with the installed system Node v24.18.0 and its Corepack-managed pnpm 11.7.0. The temporary PATH shim was removed after the successful run and is not retained.
limitations: Pre-existing Windows file-symlink construction cases that receive EPERM remain skipped by their existing platform guards.
A successful repository verification does not satisfy the missing authority-approved live execution-boundary attestation.
